name: GIGABYTE B760M C Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7600(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort 1.2 - GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 802.11ac
shortName: GIGABYTE B760M C Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 support and four M.2 slots.
